nasb.text: While the meat was still between their teeth, before it was chewed, the anger of the Lord was kindled against the people, and the Lord struck the people with a very severe plague.

esv.text: While the meat was yet between their teeth, before it was consumed, the anger of the Lord was kindled against the people, and the Lord struck down the people with a very great plague.

cnv.text: 肉在他們牙齒之間，還沒有嚼爛，耶和華的怒氣就向人民發作，用極重的災禍擊打他們。

ccb.text: 他们口中的肉还没嚼烂，耶和华的怒气就已向他们发作，降下了大灾。
